CustomField.description: Number of days from the Original Close Date Stamp to the SaaS Activation Date Stamp field. (SaaS_Activation_Date_Stamp__c - Original_Close_Date_Stamp__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of days from the Original Close Date Stamp to the SaaS Activation Date Stamp field.
CustomField.label: Days SaaS CW to Activated Stamp
